project: i-Prime AGV System — HMI Design Spec

calling_stations.semantic: button press = call + variant in one event

home_station_pc.process: iprime_master (asyncio): Modbus poll + dispatcher + MQTT client + Flask/WS + sqlite logger

system.control_flow: DI rising edge → Call object in queue → dispatcher MQTT dispatch cmd → AGV ack + execute. HMI is read-only view; never a peer.

home_hmi.tech: Flask + Vue3 CDN (no build step) or htmx; WebSocket state push at 10 Hz or on-change; no auth
home_hmi.touch: min 12mm×12mm (~85px) targets; min 18px body text; assume gloves

1_operations.layout: left: next-action panel + two AGV status cards; right: call queue (loop A+B, C+D) + alarm strip; persistent bottom nav 80px

next_action_panel.content: variant (120pt, colour-coded) + target AGV + destination(s) + DEPART button
next_action_panel.depart_enabled_when: AGV at home (RFID HOME tag + AGV at_home=true via MQTT)

1_operations.agv_card: mode (colour-coded) + zone + battery (bar, warn@30%, alarm@15%) + speed
1_operations.alarm_strip: active alarms only; tap to silence buzzer; visual clears on condition clear; icons: ⚠warn ✕fault ⓘinfo

2_manual_dispatch.validation: zones A/D: exactly 1 stop; zones B/C: 1–2 stops; out-of-loop stops greyed
2_manual_dispatch.abort_section: shows active dispatch + [CANCEL DISPATCH] [RECALL HOME] buttons
2_manual_dispatch.agv_control: [FORCE TO MANUAL] (software cmd; requires physical switch flip) | [RETURN HOME] (special dispatch, no stops)

3_diagnostics_kpis.left: shift cycle counts per loop; variant histogram; AGV uptime/availability%; system health (Modbus banks, MQTT, dispatcher loop ms)
3_diagnostics_kpis.right: AGV telemetry selector (AGV-1/2); full AMRState snapshot; alarm history last 50 events
3_diagnostics_kpis.data_source: sqlite event log, per-shift, no MES/ERP integration v1

home_hmi.andon: 3-colour tower (green/amber/red) + buzzer; wired via DO on Modbus bus; dispatcher writes on highest alarm level

agv_hmi.runtime: Chromium-kiosk on AGV PC (Ubuntu 22); Flask app reading AMRState via Unix socket or local MQTT topic
agv_hmi.normal_use: physical pendant + station buttons; HMI for maintenance/commissioning/troubleshooting only

pages.1_status: mode indicator; tape/lateral-error gauge; last RFID; current task+stage; battery bar+voltage; L/R wheel RPM; PID output; link health (CAN, Modbus DIO, Modbus AO, RFID, MQTT, pendant); active alarms

2_manual_control.gate: physical mode switch = MANUAL AND (pendant detected OR Maintenance Mode toggle active)
2_manual_control.jog: 8-direction momentary buttons (FWD/REV/L/R/diagonals); pusher UP/DOWN/TOGGLE (conditional on hardware); manual speed V_MAN configurable
2_manual_control.safety: WebSocket heartbeat; >200ms silence → control stack forces idle

pages.3_parameters: read-only by default; Edit gated by Maintenance Mode; PID gains per speed mode; speed targets; accel ramp; V_RED coefficients; RFID command map; saves to parameters.json + soft-reload control stack
pages.4_io_alarms: live DI/DO bits (16 each) + AO voltages + raw CAN frames + last RFID; labelled by system_summary.json symbolic names; alarm log last 100 events with severity filter; CSV export

comms.dispatch_id: UUID per call; echoed on every AGV ack/event for dedup/ordering

modbus_polling.debounce: 10ms hardware filter on DI module; industrial buttons rated ≥100ms bounce

transitions: zone B/C + AGV free → WAITING_PARTNER; zone A/D + AGV free → ASSIGNED
AGV idle at home → AT_HOME_LOAD (next-action shown)
line op depart (1-stop or last stop) → RETURNING
manual cancel from any pre-transit state → CANCELLED
call_lifecycle.logging: every transition timestamped to sqlite; raw data for KPI cycle counts and timing

tech_stack.frontend: Vue3 CDN or htmx + vanilla JS (no Node toolchain on production PC)
tech_stack.ipc: WebSocket (websockets lib) for HMI; MQTT for AGVs

open_questions: Calling-station LED feedback: DO per button (228 extra DO points) vs tactile-only — decision needed before hardware procurement
AGV WiFi loss mid-trip: QoS1 abort queued by broker; policy needed if abort arrives post-completion
End-of-shift cleanup: unfinished trolleys to Store-After-Boiacca — needs 'shift end' manual dispatch mode
Pusher mechanism: present on i-Prime AGVs? Software control needed? HMI has reserved space but impl conditional
Andon DO bus: if DI modules are read-only, a separate DO module is required — wiring decision
Display procurement: verify 10.4" 1600x900 candidate is glove-compatible and IP54+ rated
Operator training: 15-min walkthrough target — validate via paper prototype before coding

phase3_manual_agv_hmi_2wk: AGV HMI Page 1 Status + Page 4 I/O Monitor
phasing.total_estimate: 7–10 weeks, single dev; excludes AGV commissioning, DI bank wiring, plant integration, training
